but also I really wanna start playing more fangames so I have more than just 2 on rotation

shoutouts to k2 warped for being the best fangame by the way
you see the problem is that I haven’t tried many non mainstream fangames, which is why I want to start

like it's going to be the same screens

Check my follower account btw it’s hilarious

as long as you memorize the route
your memory is actually terrible, I think that’s the reason it took you so long 😭
that and you normally don’t play needle

anyway I think k2 warped is varied enough because you get like all the k3 guest stage tilesets and then you get like more abstract stuff like the baka tileset and boss rush's tileset and they all still keep the grid background and same tiles it's like minimalist while still keeping like identities for the stages

Didn't have much issues with the two games last year. I think this year specifically was different given the switch to Linux and being in a different place for Christmas break.
